name: scico-skills
description: A collection of Claude Code skills for scientific research and publication. scientific-data-viz — publication-quality, code-rendered journal figures from real data (20 palettes, statistics incl. PERMANOVA). amplicon-analysis — 16S/ITS microbiome pipeline (FASTQ via DADA2 or feature table): alpha & beta diversity (PCoA, PERMANOVA) and differential abundance. shotgun-analysis — shotgun metagenomics: QC + host removal, read-based profiling (MetaPhlAn/Kraken2, HUMAnN) or assembly-based MAGs (MEGAHIT, MetaBAT2/CONCOCT/SemiBin2 + DAS_Tool, CheckM2, GTDB-Tk), then diversity and differential abundance. genome-analysis — bacterial isolate genome backbone: QC, assembly (SPAdes/Unicycler/Shovill/SKESA/Flye/Canu/Raven), assembly QC (QUAST, CheckM2), annotation (Bakta/Prokka), species ID (GTDB-Tk/ANI). strain-typing — MLST, serotyping (SISTR/ECTyper), cgMLST (chewBBACA). amr-profiling — AMR genes, virulence, and plasmids via AMRFinderPlus + abricate. transcriptome-analysis — bulk RNA-seq: QC, quantification (Salmon/kallisto/STAR), differential expression (pydeseq2), enrichment, with PCA/volcano/heatmap. metatranscriptome-analysis — community RNA-seq: QC + host removal, rRNA removal (SortMeRNA), functional (HUMAnN) and taxonomic (MetaPhlAn) profiling of the active community, then diversity and differential abundance. microbiome-metabolome-analysis — untargeted metabolomics statistics from an annotated feature table: filtering/imputation, PQN normalization, log+Pareto, univariate (BH-FDR, volcano), PCA and PLS-DA with VIP and a permutation test, optional ORA enrichment. microbiome-multiomics-analysis — integrate paired metagenome/metatranscriptome/metabolome: per-omic CLR, PERMANOVA condition footprint, cross-omic Spearman correlation network (BH-FDR), Procrustes/Mantel concordance, optional MOFA+ shared factors. metabolomics-analysis — untargeted-metabolomics upstream (raw LC-MS/GC-MS to an annotated feature table): feature detection (asari/XCMS, eRah/MS-DIAL), RT alignment, QC (pooled-QC RSD filter, QC-RLSC drift correction), and annotation (matchms spectral matching, precursor-gated MSI confidence levels); hands off to microbiome-metabolome-analysis. virome-analysis — metagenomic virome / phages: viral contig identification (geNomad), QC + provirus excision (CheckV), dereplication into vOTUs (95% ANI / 85% AF), read-mapped abundance (CoverM, coverage-breadth cutoff), then diversity and differential abundance reusing the amplicon-analysis core. resistome-analysis — community antibiotic-resistance genes (ARGs) profiled from a metagenome's reads: ARG detection (RGI/CARD, DeepARG, AMR++/MEGARes), hAMRonization, normalization (RPKM + per-single-copy-gene / per-16S), drug-class aggregation (ARO), and an ARG x samples abundance table for diversity and differential abundance reusing the amplicon-analysis core (distinct from amr-profiling for a single isolate). strain-tracking — following the same bacterial strain across a multi-sample metagenome cohort (sharing, transmission, persistence): per-sample strain profiling (StrainPhlAn 4 marker-based, or inStrain popANI reference/MAG-based), per-species cross-sample strain distance matrices, same-strain calls (inStrain popANI >= 99.999%, StrainPhlAn nucleotide distance), a strain-sharing network, and longitudinal persistence (distinct from strain-typing for a single isolate). scientific-workflow-viz — BioRender-style concept-figure image prompts with optional Google Nano Banana (Gemini) rendering. bioinfo-tool-builder — autonomously build a new bioinformatics tool from a research goal (deep paper/tool survey, algorithm design, feasibility, honest benchmark vs the real competitors closer to ground truth), conda-isolated, two-lens review, low-friction CLI.
